# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test-only change

## Validation

- [ ] Server tests pass (`cd server && npm test`)
- [ ] Client checks pass (`cd client && npm run lint && npm run build`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Manual test steps documented below

1.
2.

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not push directly to `main`
- [ ] This PR is focused and scoped to one objective
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior/API/workflow changed
- [ ] I resolved review comments/conversations
